personal.name: Soujanya Roy
personal.title: Professional Animator & UI/UX Designer
personal.tagline: Crafting Digital Experiences Through Motion & Design
personal.bio: I'm a passionate animator and UI/UX designer with a keen eye for detail and a love for creating immersive digital experiences. With expertise in character design, motion graphics, and user interface design, I bring stories to life through carefully crafted visuals and seamless interactions.

projects.title: Dr. Vane - Character Design
projects.description: A post-apocalyptic character design featuring Dr. Vane, a failed doctor turned survivor. The design showcases the full character development process from silhouette to final colored artwork with a complete color palette.

projects.title: Anati - Character Illustration
projects.description: A whimsical character design of Anati, a friendly duck-human hybrid. This playful character showcases creativity in combining human and animal elements with a warm, approachable personality.

projects.title: Enchanted Cave - Background Design
projects.description: A beautifully crafted cave interior environment design featuring warm earthly tones, magical artifacts, and atmospheric lighting. Perfect for animation or game environments.

projects.title: Delphina - Character Design
projects.description: Meet Delphina, a gentle dragon who collects teacups. This character design tells a story of finding treasure in moments of connection rather than material wealth.

projects.title: Will - Character Design
projects.description: Will is a gentle, curious village boy who befriends a wolf. This character design explores themes of empathy, trust, and understanding through a charming visual narrative.

services.title: Character Design
services.description: Creating unique, memorable characters with personality and depth for games, animation, and brand mascots.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Designing intuitive, beautiful interfaces that enhance user experience and drive engagement.

services.title: Animation
services.description: Bringing stories to life through 2D animation, motion graphics, and dynamic visual storytelling.

services.title: Illustration
services.description: Creating stunning digital illustrations for books, marketing materials, and editorial content.

experience.description: Leading design initiatives for mobile and web applications, creating animation assets for marketing campaigns.
Designed characters for indie games, children's books, and animated shorts.
Created 2D animations for commercials and explainer videos.

testimonials.name: Alex Chen
testimonials.text: Soujanya's work exceeded our expectations. Her character designs brought our brand mascot to life in ways we never imagined possible.

testimonials.name: Maya Patel
testimonials.text: Working with Soujanya on our app redesign was a fantastic experience. Her UI/UX skills combined with animation expertise made our product stand out.
